import React from 'react'; const Contact = () => { const contactInfo = [ { icon: '📍', label: 'Office Address', value: '42, Water Tower Road, Kukatpally\nHyderabad – 500072, Telangana' }, { icon: '📞', label: 'Phone Number', value: '+91 98765 43210', href: 'tel:+919876543210' }, { icon: '✉️', label: 'Email Address', value: 'support@bluedrop.in', href: 'mailto:support@bluedrop.in' }, { icon: '🕐', label: 'Business Hours', value: 'Monday – Saturday\n9:00 AM – 7:00 PM' }, ]; return (

))}

); }; export default Contact;
